---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, parser improvement, validation split, or report change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature

What would you like added or changed?

## Use Case

Who would use this, and what workflow would it improve?

## Input / Output

If relevant, describe the expected input format and output artifact.

## Scientific Boundary

Could this affect interpretation, safety, validation, or clinical-use claims?

## Data Provenance

If this uses a new dataset, include source, license/access constraints, and
whether it is public or controlled-access.

## Implementation Notes

Optional notes, links, examples, or references.

## Acceptance Criteria

-
